live_message: Aaliyah Johnson is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying her — first-time color client, asking about balayage and pricing.
live_message_es: Aaliyah Johnson está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente la está calificando — primera vez con color, preguntando sobre balayage y precios.

calls.name: Aaliyah Johnson

transcript.text: Queen Umoja Studio, how can I help?
Hi, I'm thinking about a balayage. I've never done color before. Is that okay?
It's a great place to start. First-time color clients get a free 15-minute consult with the stylist before we touch your hair. May I ask your name?
Aaliyah Johnson.
Nice to meet you, Aaliyah. About how long is your hair, and is it natural or relaxed?
Natural, about shoulder length. Type four if that matters.
It does — Lisa specializes in natural hair color. She has Saturday at 11:00 AM open. The consult is free, full balayage runs about three hours. Does Saturday work?

calls.summary_long: Aaliyah Johnson, first-time color client interested in balayage. Natural type 4 hair, shoulder length. Routed to stylist Lisa (natural-hair specialist). Free consult offered before commit. Discussing Saturday 11:00 AM slot. Call in progress.

calls.name: Tiffany Reyes
calls.summary: Booked Saturday 11:00 AM — full color + cut

transcript.text: Queen Umoja Studio, hi.
I need a touch-up and a trim. I usually see Brianna.
Of course. Last name and what color are we doing?
Reyes. R-E-Y-E-S. Same color as last time — warm caramel.
Got it, Tiffany. Brianna's next opening is Saturday 11:00 AM for full color plus a cut, three hours total. That works?
Perfect.
Booked. Saturday 11:00 AM, Brianna, full color and cut, three hours. Cancellation window is 48 hours. See you Saturday.

calls.summary_long: Tiffany Reyes — returning client of stylist Brianna. Booked Saturday 11:00 AM full color (warm caramel, repeat) + cut, 180m. Pulled color history from past appointment. Cancellation policy stated. SMS confirmation sent.

calls.name: Anonymous caller

transcript.text: Queen Umoja Studio, evening hours assistant.
Hi, are you guys still open? I want to book a trim.
The studio is closed, but I can book you anytime. May I have your name?
Actually, I'd rather not say. Just want to know if I can come in Thursday.
No problem. I can book under just a phone number. We have Thursday 10:00 AM open with Amara — quick trim, 45 minutes, $55.
Yeah I'll take it. Number is 610-555-0142.
Booked under that number for Thursday 10:00 AM. We'll text you a reminder Wednesday night.

calls.summary_long: Anonymous caller (no name given), booked Thursday 10:00 AM trim with stylist Amara, 45m, $55. Privacy respected — booking accepted with phone number only. SMS reminder Wednesday.

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Asked if you accept walk-ins (no — referred to booking)
